---
title: "Exercises"
---

### scRNA-seq Tutorial Series (self-study with questions)

Walk the standard Seurat scRNA-seq workflow on the public 10x **20k NSCLC DTC** dataset. Each tutorial has runnable code chunks and interleaved *Think about it* questions with collapsible answers.

[Tutorial 01 — QC & Preprocessing](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_01_QC_Preprocessing.qmd)

[Tutorial 02 — Dimensionality Reduction & Clustering](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_02_DimReduction_Clustering.qmd)

[Tutorial 03 — Markers & Cell Type Annotation](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_03_Markers_Annotation.qmd)

### Bonus Exercise

[Exercise — scATAC-seq with Signac](Exercise_Folder/Exercise_ATACseq_Signac.qmd) — parallel workflow on PBMC 10k scATAC-seq data

### Exercise Template

[Exercise Template](Exercise_Folder/Exercise_Template.qmd)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Datasets

*Link to datasets used in exercises as they are added.*

-   scRNA-seq: [10x Genomics — 20k NSCLC DTC, 3' v3.1 Multiplex](https://www.10xgenomics.com/resources/datasets/20-k-mixture-of-nsclc-dt-cs-from-7-donors-3-v-3-1-multiplex-3-1-standard-6-0-0)
-   scATAC-seq: [10x Genomics — PBMC 10k scATAC-seq](https://www.10xgenomics.com/resources/datasets/10-k-peripheral-blood-mononuclear-cells-pbm-cs-from-a-healthy-donor-next-gem-v-1-1-1-1-standard-2-0-0)
